chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
When a person applies for a permit under Section 623.011 (Permit for Excess Axle or Gross Weight) , the person must pay in addition to other fees an administrative fee adopted by board rule in an amount not to exceed the direct and indirect cost to the department of:

(1) issuing a sticker under Section 623.011 (Permit for Excess Axle or Gross Weight) (d);

(2) distributing fees under Section 621.353 (Distribution of Fee for Permit for Excess Weight) ; and

(3) maintaining the list under Section 623.013 (List of Permits Issued) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.0112 — Additional Administrative Fee

When a person applies for a permit under Section 623.011 (Permit for Excess Axle or Gross Weight) , the person must pay in addition to other fees an administrative fee adopted by board rule in an amount not to exceed the direct and indirect cost to the department of:

    (1) issuing a sticker under Section 623.011 (Permit for Excess Axle or Gross Weight) (d);

    (2) distributing fees under Section 621.353 (Distribution of Fee for Permit for Excess Weight) ; and

    (3) maintaining the list under Section 623.013 (List of Permits Issued) .

*Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 410 (S.B.1814), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2021.*

subsections.text: When a person applies for a permit under Section 623.011 (Permit for Excess Axle or Gross Weight) , the person must pay in addition to other fees an administrative fee adopted by board rule in an amount not to exceed the direct and indirect cost to the department of:
issuing a sticker under Section 623.011 (Permit for Excess Axle or Gross Weight) (d);
distributing fees under Section 621.353 (Distribution of Fee for Permit for Excess Weight) ; and
maintaining the list under Section 623.013 (List of Permits Issued) .

history.raw: Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 410 (S.B.1814), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2021.
